defs: The practice of folly; the behavior of a fool; foolish behavior; absurdity.
quotes: Folly in fools bears not so strong a note, As foolery in the wise, when wit doth dote.

defs: An act of folly or weakness; a foolish practice; something absurd or nonsensical.
quotes: That Pythagoras, Plato, or Orpheus, believed in any of these fooleries, it can not be suspected.
